remaining_params.SpellDescription: You and target opponent each draw a card.

params.SpellDescription: Choose left or right. Until your next turn, each player may attack only the nearest opponent in the last chosen direction and planeswalkers controlled by that opponent.

params.TriggerDescription: When CARDNAME enters, create a 0/4 white Wall creature token with defender and flying.
